basic_details.job_title: CSPDCL Apprentices Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 160 Graduate & Diploma Apprentice Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chhattisgarh State Power Distribution Company Limited is recruiting 160 Apprentices posts including Graduate & Diploma Apprentice, with Any Graduate, Diploma, B.Tech/B.E qualification, last date 24 July 2026. Also Read: Indian Navy SSC Officer Recruitment 2026 Jun 2027 (AT 27) Course Notification Out

qualification.details: To apply for CSPDCL Apprenticeship 2026-27, candidates must be a domicile of Chhattisgarh, hold a relevant degree or diploma from a recognised university/institution, and must not have prior work experience of one year or more, or be currently undergoing similar training elsewhere. | Graduate Apprentice (Engineering): B.E. / B.Tech degree in Electrical, EEE, or Mechanical Engineering from a recognised university. Graduate Apprentice (Non-Engineering): Bachelor's degree in B.Sc. / BBA / BCOM from a recognised university in the relevant stream. Diploma Apprentice (Engineering): Diploma in Electrical / EEE or Mechanical Engineering from a recognised institution. | The applicant must be a permanent resident / domicile of Chhattisgarh state. Candidates with one year or more of work experience are not eligible. Candidates currently undergoing or who have previously completed apprenticeship training under the Apprentices Act 1961 at any other establishment are not eligible. Graduate candidates must have completed their graduation not more than five years prior to the commencement of training (otherwise ineligible). Registration on the NATS (National Apprenticeship Training Scheme) portal is mandatory before applying.

vacancy_details.Qualification: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch from a recognised university
B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch from a recognised university
Graduate from recognised university in relevant stream
Diploma in relevant engineering branch from a recognised institution

salary_details.details: Graduate Apprentices (Engineering & Non-Engineering) will receive ₹12,300 per month, while Diploma Apprentices will receive ₹10,900 per month. No hostel or transport allowance is provided. | Graduate Apprentice (Electrical/EEE Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, B.Sc., BBA, BCOM): ₹12,300 per month Diploma Apprentice (Electrical/EEE Engineering, Mechanical Engineering): ₹10,900 per month | Note: No hostel facility or transportation allowance is provided to apprentices. Candidates should make their own arrangements for accommodation and commute. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: CSPDCL selects apprentices purely on the basis of a merit list prepared from marks scored in the qualifying degree or diploma examination. No separate written test or interview is conducted.

Candidate selection will be done strictly through a merit list based on marks obtained in the bachelor's degree or diploma examination. There is no written test or interview for this apprenticeship. The higher the percentage in your qualifying exam
the better your chances of selection.
All selected candidates must submit a declaration at the time of joining
confirming they have not previously received training under the Apprentices Act 1961 (as amended up to 2025) at any establishment.
Also Read: BRO GREF Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 899 Electrician
how_to_apply: CSPDCL apprenticeship applications must be submitted offline - either by post or in person - to the Executive Director (Training, Research & Development), CSPDCL, Kota Road, Gudhiyari, Raipur, C.G. – 492009, on or before 24 July 2026.

Unlike many modern recruitments, CSPDCL Apprenticeship 2026-27 applications are accepted only in physical (offline) format. However, before applying, all candidates must complete their online registration on the NATS portal. Follow the step-by-step process below:
Complete NATS Registration Online: Visit www.nats.education.gov.in and register as an apprentice to obtain your NATS registration number. This is the only online step.

Download and Fill the Application Form: Obtain the prescribed application form (attached in the advertisement). Fill it completely and accurately. Incomplete or illegible applications will be rejected without notice.

Attach All Required Documents: Attach self-attested photocopies of all required certificates - 10th, 12th, graduation/diploma marksheets, caste certificate (if applicable), domicile certificate, and your NATS registration form.

Prepare the Envelope (Mandatory Format): Use a 36.5 × 25.5 cm sealed envelope. Write the following on the envelope: NATS Registration Number, category (GEN/OBC/SC/ST), year of pass-out, the post applied for, branch of graduation/diploma, and percentage achieved.
Send or Submit the Application: Post or hand-deliver the sealed envelope to the address below on or before 24 July 2026, within office hours (10:00 AM – 5:00 PM).
Application Address: Executive Director (Training, Research & Development) Chhattisgarh State Power Distribution Company Limited, Kota Road, Gudhiyari, Raipur – 492009 (C.G.)
Register on NATS Portal | Visit CSPDCL Official Website
important_instructions: Completing the CSPDCL apprenticeship does not guarantee permanent or temporary employment with CSPDCL. The training is purely for skill development under the Apprentices Act.

The apprenticeship training period is one year only. Completion of training does not entitle the apprentice to any regular or temporary employment with CSPDCL. Candidates with prior work experience of one year or more are ineligible. Graduates whose result was declared more than five years ago are not eligible. No hostel accommodation or transport allowance is provided. Applications submitted after the deadline will not be considered under any circumstances. All other terms and conditions are governed by the Apprentices Act 1961 (as amended in 1973, 1986, 2014, 2019, and 2025). CSPDCL reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is CSPDCL Apprenticeship 2026-27?
faq.answer: CSPDCL Apprenticeship 2026-27 is a one-year structured apprenticeship training program offered by Chhattisgarh State Power Distribution Company Limited under the Apprentices Act 1961. It covers 160 posts across Graduate (Engineering & Non-Engineering) and Diploma (Engineering) categories.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for CSPDCL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application - either by post or in person at the CSPDCL office — is 24 July 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q3. What is the monthly stipend for CSPDCL apprentices?
faq.answer: Graduate Apprentices (Engineering and Non-Engineering) receive ₹12,300 per month. Diploma Apprentices (Engineering) receive ₹10,900 per month. No additional allowances are provided.

faq.question: Q4. Is NATS registration mandatory for CSPDCL Apprenticeship?
faq.answer: Yes. Registration on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal at www.nats.education.gov.in is mandatory. The NATS registration number must be clearly mentioned on the application form and on the postal envelope. Applications without this number will be rejected.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an online application form for CSPDCL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: No. CSPDCL does not accept online applications. The application must be submitted in physical format (offline), either by postal mail or by personally delivering it to the CSPDCL office in Gudhiyari, Raipur, during office hours (10:00 AM to 5:00 PM). However, NATS portal registration is done online.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CSPDCL Apprenticeship?
faq.answer: Selection is done strictly on the basis of a merit list prepared from marks scored in the qualifying examination (degree or diploma). There is no written test or personal interview.

faq.question: Q7. Will I get a job at CSPDCL after completing the apprenticeship?
faq.answer: No. Completion of the one-year apprenticeship training does not entitle the candidate to any form of regular or temporary employment with CSPDCL. The program is purely for training and skill development under the Apprentices Act.

faq.question: Q8. Who is eligible to apply for CSPDCL Apprenticeship 2026-27?
faq.answer: Candidates must be permanent residents of Chhattisgarh, hold the relevant degree or diploma, must not have worked for one year or more, and must not have previously undergone or be currently undergoing similar apprenticeship training. Graduates whose results were declared more than five years ago are not eligible.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are needed to apply for CSPDCL Apprenticeship?
faq.answer: You need self-attested copies of your 10th & 12th marksheets, graduation/diploma marksheet and certificate, caste certificate (for SC/ST/OBC), permanent domicile certificate of Chhattisgarh, and the NATS Registration Form with your registration number.

faq.question: Q10. How should the application envelope be prepared?
faq.answer: The envelope must be 36.5 × 25.5 cm in size. It must mention: your NATS Registration Number, category (GEN/OBC/SC/ST), year of pass-out, the post applied for (Graduate/Diploma Apprentice), branch of study, and percentage secured. This format is mandatory as per the official advertisement.
